name: S3_registry_bitmap
description: Standalone runner: parses name[:params], looks name up in a fixed registry, sets its bit in a bitmap, returns the bitmap; 255 if no args, 254 if a name is unknown. (Params are ignored here.)
io_hint: If a name is not in the registry, return the designated unknown status immediately. Don’t approximate or partially match; require exact equality and avoid fallbacks or hard-coded outputs.
